prompt: TOP-DOWN high-angle (3/4 bird's eye) view of a cozy candy bakery shop interior floor for a children's game, in the style of cute top-down management games like Monkey Mart: warm wooden plank floor filling the frame, a long light-wood service counter running horizontally across the middle, tall shelves full of colorful candy jars and cakes along the top wall, a striped awning detail, an entrance doormat at the bottom center, a couple of small round tables with chairs. Same size, same scale, same lighting in all cells. SIX DIFFERENT cute customer characters for a children's game, each seen from a HIGH 3/4 TOP-DOWN camera angle, each standing and facing DOWN toward the viewer with a friendly happy expression: (1) a bunny in a little blue shirt; (2) a brown bear cub in a green shirt; (3) a little human boy with a cap; (4) a little human girl with pigtails; (5) an orange cat in overalls; (6) a pink piglet in a yellow dress.
